title: Format Number integration Eledo
excerpt:
How can I put a format for numbers in Eledo to create a PDF? 
I want to use commas to divide the number, example: 000,000.00

posts.author: grupol2f2 (Luis G)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I put a format for numbers in Eledo to create a PDF?

I want to use commas to divide the number, example: 000,000.00

posts.author: lubos.husivarga (Lubos Husivarga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @grupol2f2

In Eledo you can format numbers into a currency format easily using CURR() function in your data expression. The CURR function has 3 parameters:

  1. number to format
  2. number of leading zeroes to add
  3. number of decimal places to display

In Eledo’s data expression the full example looks like this:
CURR(item.numbers_3, 0, 2)

And the result will be like:
1,234.56

Thousands and decimals separators depends on locale selected in Settings menu of your Eledo template editor.

You can also add a currency sign using CONCAT function like:
CONCAT(“$”, CURR(item.numbers_3, 0, 2))

Hope it helps!

Lubos
